# Jens Langkammer – Director, Strategy& (PwC)

> Personal Web Hub of Jens Langkammer, Director at Strategy& (part of the PwC network). Expert in Consumer Markets, eGrocery, and E-Commerce Strategy in Europe.

## Profile Summary

- **Name:** Jens Langkammer
- **Job Title:** Director – Retail & Consumer Goods
- **Organization:** Strategy&, part of the PwC network
- **Core Competencies:** Consumer Markets, eGrocery, E-Commerce Strategy, Customer Data ROI, Omni-Channel Strategy, Embedded Insurance, Retail Digitalization, Quick Commerce, Consumer Behavior.
- **Languages:** German (de), English (en), French (fr), Spanish (es)
- **Education:** Master of Business Administration (MBA) from IE Business School, Madrid. Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) from Hochschule Ludwigshafen.

## Main Navigation

- [Jens Langkammer Web Hub](https://jens-langkammer.de/) - Biography, core competencies, career timeline, and publication catalog.
- [Impressum](https://jens-langkammer.de/impressum) - Legal notice and corporate information (Pragma Code LLC).
- [Datenschutzerklärung](https://jens-langkammer.de/datenschutz) - GDPR-compliant data privacy statement.

## Biography

Jens Langkammer is a strategy consultant for C-level executives in the global retail and consumer goods sectors. Before joining Strategy&, he founded and managed multiple e-commerce and tech startups, combining deep hands-on entrepreneurial experience with corporate strategy consulting.

## Career Timeline

- **July 2021 – Present:** Director – Retail & Consumer Goods, Strategy& (PwC network). Focus on digital transformation, eGrocery, omni-channel strategy, and first-party data monetization.
- **July 2017 – June 2021:** Senior Manager / Engagement Manager / Senior Associate, Strategy&.
- **Nov 2014 – June 2017:** CEO & Founder, actify GmbH (E-commerce and technology company).
- **March 2012 – March 2015:** Revenue Manager, PepsiCo Germany.
- **Dec 2010 – March 2012:** CEO & Founder, kookini GmbH (E-commerce platform).
- **Oct 2008 – Dec 2010:** Business Planning Analyst, PepsiCo Germany.
- **Jan 2007 – Aug 2008:** Corporate Controlling & Project Management, RWE AG.

## Selected Publications & Studies

- [The State of the eGrocery Market](https://www.strategyand.pwc.com/de/en/industries/consumer-markets/the-state-of-the-egrocery-market.html) - Leading market study on profitability and future trends of online grocery retail in Europe.
- [ROI of Customer Data](https://www.strategyand.pwc.com/de/en/industries/consumer-markets/roi-of-customer-data.html) - Strategy& study on maximizing the financial returns of customer data.
- [The Future of Grocery Shopping](https://www.strategyand.pwc.com/de/en/industries/consumer-markets/future-of-grocery-shopping.html) - Research on evolving consumer habits and expectations in grocery shopping.
- [Voice of the Consumer Survey 2025](https://www.pwc.de/de/pressemitteilungen/2025/preis-vor-nachhaltigkeit-deutsche-wollen-beim-lebensmittelkauf-sparen.html) - PwC Germany survey detailing consumer budget allocations and sustainability attitudes.
- [WirtschaftsWoche Interview on Quick Commerce Regulation](https://www.wiwo.de/unternehmen/dienstleister/lieferdienst-warenlager-in-frankreich-vor-dem-aus-dieses-neue-gesetz-stellt-gorillas-und-flink-vor-probleme-in-frankreich/28677718.html) - Professional commentary on the regulatory environment for dark stores and grocery delivery services in France.
